name: book-management-api
description: Backend API for managing a book catalog with Express, Sequelize, and MySQL.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check config/db.js && node --check models/book.js && node --check routes/books.js && node --check controllers/booksController.js && node --check middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check middleware/notFound.js
